metadata.name: resurrection of an oldie (Chaos Tiled)
metadata.author: Flexi
metadata.source: Flexi - resurrection of an oldie (Chaos Tiled).milk

perFrameCode: bounce = below(y1,r);y1 = y1+vy1;vy1 = if(bounce, abs(vy1)*0.94 + (r-y1)*0.1, vy1-0.0001*60/fps);
bounce = below(x1,r);x1 = x1+vx1;vx1 = if(bounce, abs(vx1)*0.94 + (r-x1)*0.1, vx1);
bounce = below(y2,r);y2 = y2 + vy2;vy2 = if(bounce,abs(vy2)*0.94+(r-y2)*.1, vy2-0.0001*60/fps);
bounce = below(x2,r);x2 = x2+ vx2;vx2 = if(bounce, abs(vx2)*0.94 + (r-x2)*0.1, vx2);
bounce = below(y3,r);y3 = y3 + vy3;vy3 = if(bounce,abs(vy3)*0.94+(r-y3)*.1, vy3-0.0001*60/fps);
bounce = below(x3,r);x3 = x3+ vx3;vx3 = if(bounce, abs(vx3)*0.94 + (r-x3)*0.1, vx3);
bounce = below(y4,r);y4 = y4 + vy4;vy4 = if(bounce,abs(vy4)*0.94+(r-y4)*.1, vy4-0.0001*60/fps);
bounce = below(x4,r);x4 = x4+ vx4;vx4 = if(bounce, abs(vx4)*0.94 + (r-x4)*0.1, vx4);
